name: Moo Goo Gai Pan (Stir-fried Chicken & Mushroo
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients ready before beginning.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large frying pan or wok.
3. When the oil is very hot, stir-fry the onions and mushrooms for 3 minutes.
4. Remove the onions and mushrooms to a bowl.
5. Add another 6 tablespoons oil to the pan.
6. Stir-fry chicken until no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
7. Return the onions and mushrooms to the skillet.
8. Add soy sauce and salt to taste.
9. Remove to a plate and serve immediately.
NOTE: The chicken pieces may be marinated for 15 to 30 minutes before frying in a mixture of 1 egg white, cornstarch, 2 teaspoons dry sherry, and salt and pepper to taste. This tenderizes the chicken and adds flavor. Sliced water chestnuts and snow peas may be stir-fried with the mushrooms.
